news.summary: Car-Mart, Inc. (NASDAQ: CRMT) released its fourth-quarter earnings, surpassing expectations with earnings per share at $1.26 compared to the estimated 86 cents. The company recorded quarterly sales of $370.17 million, marking a 1.5% increase from the previous year and exceeding the projected $351.85 million. Sales volume for the quarter rose by 2.6% to 15,649 units while interest income saw a 4.2% increase to $2.4 million. Net charge-offs as a percentage of average finance receivables improved to 6.9% from 7.3% and interest expense decreased by 2.2%. The average vehicle sales price dropped $316 year-over-year and $70 sequentially.
news.headline: America's Car-Mart beats Q4 expectations with earnings per share of $1.26. Quarter sales total $370.17 million, sales volumes up 2.6%, interest income up 4.2%. Net charge-offs down to 6.9%. Average vehicle sales price decreased. Financiers warned after dollar hits 2-year low.

news.summary: In Atlanta, Source Support Services has named Jim Kirby as its new CEO. Kirby will be tasked with overseeing the expansion of global support for original equipment manufacturers (OEM), enhancing service delivery, and fostering innovation within the company.
news.headline: Jim Kirby named CEO of Source Support Services to lead global expansion and innovation, elevate service delivery.

news.summary: In the latest report, it was disclosed that the revenues of Company X for the first quarter of the fiscal year 2022 increased by 15% compared to the same period last year, reaching a total of $1.5 billion. This growth was largely attributed to the successful launch of their new product line, which saw a 20% increase in sales. The company also reported a net profit of $200 million for the quarter, reflecting a 10% increase year-on-year. Additionally, Company X announced plans to invest $100 million in expanding its production facilities in order to meet the rising demand for their products. Overall, the company remains optimistic about its future financial performance and market position.
news.headline: Carlton Precious finalizes private placement deal, securing funding for future growth.
Prime Minister Narendra Modi likely to visit Ahmedabad tomorrow, to visit crash site - reports

news.summary: Tether, a stablecoin provider, has recently acquired a significant portion of a Canadian gold firm as part of its investment approach focused on safe-haven assets. The company's strategy involves accumulating an increasing amount of Bitcoin alongside this recent acquisition.
news.headline: Tether invests in gold, bolstering dual pillar strategy with Bitcoin holding; aiming for safe-haven assets.

news.summary: In Denmark, on 12 June 2025, Novo Nordisk revealed plans to progress subcutaneous and oral amycretin into phase 3 trials for weight management, after finished clinical studies. The decision to move forward with subcutaneous and oral amycretin in phase 3 was made following regulatory input received after the end of phase 2 discussions. This development marks a significant step in the research and potential treatment options, with important progress in the field.
news.headline: Novo Nordisk to move subcutaneous and oral amycretin for weight management into phase 3 development following positive feedback.
Genmab distributes Restricted Stock Units & Warrants to employees, enhancing benefits and improving loyalty.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, Talisker Resources Ltd. disclosed that 13,956,500 common share purchase warrants (Warrants) issued on June 6, 2025, as part of a non-brokered offering, are now tradable on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) under the symbol "TSK.WT". Talisker, trading as TSK on the TSX and TSKFF on the OTCQX, expressed satisfaction with this development.
news.headline: Talisker lists 13,956,500 warrants on TSX under symbol "TSK.WT" after non-brokered offering.

news.summary: A report on the Urea Market in China has been newly added to ResearchAndMarkets.com, providing comprehensive insight into the industry. The report covers the period of 2019-2024 with forecasts extending to 2029. It delves into supply and demand dynamics, pricing trends, and analyses of downstream industries. The comprehensive report offers a blend of high-quality tables, figures, and detailed textual content, making it a crucial resource for those seeking in-depth information on the China Urea market.
news.headline: China Urea Industry Report projects market trends from 2019-2029, covering capacity, supply, demand, manufacturers, trade, and end-users.
NBPE announces the outcome of its Annual General Meeting, with significant numbers discussed.

news.summary: GAZTRANSPORT ET TECHNIGAZ is a publicly held company with a share capital totaling €371,177.72. Its registered office is located at 1 route de Versailles – 78470 Saint-Rémy-lès-Chevreuse, France. The company is listed under 662 001 403 in the R.C.S. Versailles registry.
news.headline: GTT announced terms for share buy-back program with €371,177.72 share capital. Company based in France.

news.summary: The U.S Securities and Exchange Commission, under Chairman Paul Atkins, is considering regulatory exemptions for DeFi platforms, allowing them to launch on-chain products with less oversight. This move has sparked a debate between advocates seeing it as a victory for innovation and critics warning of potential risks. DeFi promises higher returns and lower fees through peer-to-peer transactions on decentralized networks. The proposal aims to boost financial inclusion by democratizing finance and reducing transaction costs significantly. DeFi lending protocols offer interest rates up to 10 or 100+ times higher than traditional banks, benefiting consumers looking for alternatives. Over 1.4 billion people worldwide are unbanked, and DeFi could provide access to financial services with just a smartphone and internet connection. Regulatory exemptions for DeFi could redefine the future of finance, but concerns about potential dangers and risks remain. The proposal reflects the current administration's ambition to make the U.S the "crypto capital of the planet."
news.headline: SEC is considering regulatory exemptions for DeFi platforms. Advocates see it as an innovation opportunity, but critics warn of risks. Peirce argues for not holding code publishers responsible for use. DeFi promises higher returns, lower fees, and financial inclusion. Regulatory exemptions could spark innovation, but also bring unprecedented dangers. DeFi lending protocols offer interest rates up to 10 or 100+ times higher than traditional banks. Over 1.4 billion unbanked people globally could benefit from DeFi's accessibility. Stakes are high as SEC leans towards crypto-friendly policies. (Character count: 365)

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, Rogers Communications (TSX: RCI.A and RCI.B) (NYSE: RCI) announced that they have gained approval from the Canadian Radio-television and Telecommunications Commission (CRTC) for the acquisition of Bell's stake in Toronto Raptors Network Ltd, the owner of NBA TV Canada. This deal signifies a significant move in the media landscape, solidifying Rogers Communications' position in the market. The approval marks a key development in the industry, reflecting a growing trend of mergers and acquisitions. This acquisition underscores Rogers Communications' strategic growth plan and commitment to expanding its presence in the sports media sector, aligning with its broader business objectives.
news.headline: Rogers gets CRTC approval to acquire Bell's share in Toronto Raptors Network Ltd.

news.summary: In a recent update on the economic situation, it was reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. Additionally, there was a notable increase in job creation with 250,000 new jobs added to the market. The stock market also saw growth with the main indexes rising by 2-3%. Analysts are optimistic about the future outlook, predicting a continued upward trend in employment and economic stability.
news.headline: CEO predicts AI chip market to surpass $500B by 2028.

news.summary: Representatives from the top economies globally will convene on Tuesday to negotiate a potential agreement aimed at easing stringent export limitations between their nations.
news.headline: US-China trade talks today as tensions rise over rare earths, $200B tariffs: both sides aim to ease export restrictions.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on June 12, 2025, an inventor from Enfield, Connecticut, unveiled the creation of the DIPLOMAT, aiming to provide protection for political figures, celebrities, and public speakers facing potential gunfire and violence during public appearances. The inventor sought to address threats faced by high-profile individuals and developed the innovative solution. The DIPLOMAT offers enhanced security measures for public events and represents a significant advancement in safeguarding individuals in the public eye.
news.headline: Inventor from Enfield, Conn. develops bulletproof enclosure PPA-215 to protect public speakers.

news.summary: Jensen Huang, the Founder and CEO of Nvidia Corp, recently revealed that the company has established two significant partnerships in the healthcare sector. One of these partnerships is with Novo Nordisk A/S, a European weight loss drug manufacturer, aimed at enhancing drug discovery and development processes. By utilizing the Gefion AI supercomputer from the Danish Centre for AI Innovation, they plan to develop customized AI models and agents to support early research and clinical development efforts. The collaboration will involve the use of NVIDIA BioNeMo for generative AI-powered drug discovery, NVIDIA NIM, and NVIDIA NeMo microservices. This partnership signifies Nvidia's commitment to advancing healthcare through innovative technologies.
news.headline: Nvidia partners with Novo Nordisk to advance healthcare with AI for drug discovery. Exciting collaborations on the horizon.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, the robotics company Tombot, known for its lifelike robotic puppy Jennie, has announced the completion of a successful $6.1 million Series A funding round, which was oversubscribed. CEO and Co-Founder Tom Stevens stated that Tombot is tapping into a market at the convergence of mental health and assistive technology, aiming to assist the over 300 million seniors globally dealing with dementia and mild cognitive impairments. This funding round marks a significant milestone for the company as it strives to make a positive impact in this underserved sector.
news.headline: Tombot raises $6.1M in Series A funding for robotic pet products targeting health and senior care needs.

news.summary: In San Jose, California, Calix, Inc. (NYSE: CALX) revealed that Fatbeam, a telecommunications provider experiencing rapid growth, is venturing into a significant expansion in the residential market in southern Idaho. To support this endeavor, Fatbeam has embraced the comprehensive Calix Broadband Platform and implemented SmartLife™ managed services. This move aims to provide secure and personalized experiences to both single-family homes and multi-dwelling units (MDUs). The residential market expansion project is commencing with a focus on delivering improved services to homes and MDUs.
news.headline: Fatbeam partners with Calix for broadband expansion in Idaho, aims to double home and MDU subscribers. #growthNYSCALX

news.summary: In Central Florida's Lakeland, the IEOM Society International will host its 10th North American International Conference on Industrial Engineering from June 17-19, 2025. This event will bring together leading professionals in the industrial engineering and operations management fields from over 40 countries.
news.headline: Florida Polytechnic University is co-hosting a conference with IEOM Society for 40 countries in Central Florida on June 17-19, 2025.

news.summary: In Miami on June 12, 2025, Consulting IQ revealed a new partnership with JPMorgan Chase as its main operating bank. This collaboration aims to support small to mid-sized businesses (SMBs) by providing them with AI-driven insights and advanced strategic tools. The initiative is set to boost the growth and success of SMBs.
news.headline: JPMorgan Chase and Consulting IQ team up to assist SMBs with AI-driven tools for economic success.

news.summary: The reserve fund will be financed through the issuance of stocks and various financial instruments, as per the recent statement.
news.headline: Trident Digital plans to establish a $500M XRP treasury funded through stock issuance and financial tools.

news.summary: In Havre-Saint-Pierre, Canada, mining giant Rio Tinto is injecting CA$7.6 million into an industrial demo project at the Lac Tio mine to evaluate ore sorting technology integration. The Government of Quebec is chipping in CA$2.5 million through its Support Program for Mineral Processing Scale-up, managed by the Ministry of Natural Resources. This marks a significant investment to enhance efficiency and sustainability in the extraction of critical and strategic minerals.
news.headline: Rio Tinto invests CA$7.6M in ore sorting project at Havre-Saint-Pierre mine, with CA$2.5M from Quebec government.

news.summary: In a recent announcement on June 12, 2025, Torres Trade Law, PLLC based in Dallas and Washington revealed that their Founder and Managing Member, Olga Torres, has been nationally ranked by Chambers and Partners for an impressive eight years in a row in the prestigious Chambers USA Guide. This recognition solidifies Olga Torres' esteemed reputation in the legal sphere and highlights her continued excellence in the field.
news.headline: Torres Trade Law, PLLC's Olga Torres ranked by Chambers and Partners for 8th year in a row.

news.summary: In Vancouver, Washington, on June 12, 2025, LOU®, a company supported by Evosus, announced a partnership with Heritage Pool Supply Group to introduce an innovative integration. This collaboration aims to enhance inventory and sales management for businesses. The partnership signifies a step forward in streamlining operations, with a focus on efficiency. The integration promises to revolutionize the way businesses handle their inventory and sales processes.
news.headline: LOU® and Heritage Pool Supply Group partner for efficient pool business operations, enhancing inventory and sales management.

news.summary: Comtrend, a prominent provider of broadband networking solutions, is set to unveil its new G.hn-based DPU solution at the forthcoming Broadband Communities Summit on June 23–24, 2025, in Houston, TX. This innovative technology is designed to facilitate the delivery of gigabit speeds to MDUs without the need for rewiring. Attendees will have the opportunity to learn more about this cutting-edge solution that promises faster and more efficient internet connections in multi-dwelling units.
news.headline: Comtrend to showcase G.hn Coax DPU solution at Broadband Communities Summit, promising faster Gigabit delivery to MDUs.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, the Board of Directors of Washington Trust Bancorp, Inc., announced a quarterly dividend of 56 cents per share for the quarter ending June 30, 2025. Shareholders of record on July X will receive the dividend on July 11, 2025. Washington Trust Bancorp, Inc. is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol WASH.
news.headline: Washington Trust Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: WASH) announced a quarterly dividend of 56 cents per share for the quarter ending June 30, 2025. Dividend paid on July 11, 2025.

news.summary: A recent report by Just Solutions and The Solutions Project highlights significant environmental and climate justice victories in the U.S. for the year 2024. The analysis, unveiled in Oakland, California on June 12, 2025, showcases a range of groundbreaking initiatives. This cooperation's research outlines key milestones in the environmental and climate realm, underscoring achievements that are shaping a sustainable future. The report details various impactful efforts, statistics, and strategies that have contributed to positive changes across the country.
news.headline: The Solutions Project and Just Solutions report showcases impactful climate wins, especially in frontline communities, in 2024 across the U.S.

news.summary: A resident of Willow River, Minnesota, shared that having multiple indoor plants prompted the creation of LARRYS AUTO WATER SYSTEM to streamline watering, particularly for times away from home. This innovation offers convenience for plant care, enabling users to seamlessly manage watering needs even while on vacation. The system exemplifies a solution-driven approach to plant maintenance and signifies the inventor's commitment to enhancing indoor gardening practices.
news.headline: Inventor creates LARRYS AUTO WATER SYSTEM for self-watering pots, solves indoor plant watering issue.

news.summary: In a major economic development move, JetZero revealed today a substantial $4.7 billion commitment towards establishing a production site at the Piedmont Triad International Airport (PTI) in Raleigh, North Carolina, marking the largest project of its kind in the state's history. Alongside this investment, a program is to be implemented to train over 14,500 employees for the company.
news.headline: N.C. Community College System offers training for JetZero's $4.7B site, plans to train 14,500 workers for state's largest project.

news.summary: JetZero has revealed plans to invest $4.7 billion in a production facility located at the Piedmont Triad in Raleigh, North Carolina. The aircraft OEM will manufacture its innovative all-wing Z4 airplane at this site, boasting a 50% increase in fuel efficiency compared to current commercial jets. The announcement was made on June 12, 2025.
news.headline: JetZero to invest $4.7B in NC, creating 14,500 jobs with production of Z4 plane, 50% more fuel-efficient than commercial jets.

news.summary: In Newark, Delaware, the OpenSSL Corporation and the OpenSSL Foundation have announced the upcoming OpenSSL Conference 2025 scheduled for October 7-9, 2025, in Prague, Czech Republic. The event will be held at the Vienna House by Wyndham Diplomat Prague. This significant conference aims to bring together experts...
news.headline: Submit proposal for 2025 OpenSSL Conference in Prague on October 7-9, organized by OpenSSL Corporation and Foundation.

news.summary: Beginning on June 12, 2025, Sedano's Supermarkets, a prominent Hispanic grocery chain in the United States, will now allow customers to use Over-the-Counter (OTC) and Flex benefit cards at all of their store branches. This update will provide convenience to eligible members who can now use their OTC and Flex cards for purchases at Sedano's locations across the country.
news.headline: Sedano's Supermarkets now accepting OTC & Flex benefit cards at all store locations from June 12, 2025.

news.summary: In Waco, Texas, Samsung and IngenioSpec have reached a resolution regarding their patent dispute concerning electronic earbud technology. The agreement puts an end to the legal conflict between the two companies and ensures the protection of their intellectual property. This resolution is significant in the audio industry as it involves cutting-edge technology that impacts consumer electronics. The details of the settlement, including any financial compensation or licensing agreements, have not been disclosed to the public. However, this resolution marks a positive development in the ongoing efforts to protect innovation and intellectual property rights.
news.headline: Samsung and IngenioSpec reach settlement on earbud technology patent dispute in Waco, TX.

news.summary: Chewy Inc. (NYSE: CHWY) exceeded expectations in its latest quarter, reporting a first-quarter 2025 adjusted earnings of 35 cents per share, marking a 12.9% increase year-over-year. The online pet store also saw sales of $3.12 billion, an 8.3% increase compared to the previous year. The company foresees sales for fiscal year 2025 to range between $12.30 billion-$12.45 billion, with an adjusted EBITDA margin expectation of 5.4%-5.7%. Chewy is predicting second-quarter sales of $3.06 billion-$3.09 billion and adjusted earnings of 30-35 cents per share for the same period. Analysts are optimistic about Chewy's performance, indicating potential robust share gains. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Chewy (NYSE: CHWY) reports strong Q1 earnings, with adjusted EPS of 35 cents (up 12.9%), sales of $3.12 billion (up 8.3%), exceeding expectations. Fiscal year 2025 sales expected at $12.30 billion-$12.45 billion. Investors cautious despite outperformance against pet market peers.

news.summary: Dignify Therapeutics (Dignify), a company in Research Triangle Park, North Carolina, specializing in developing pharmaceuticals and medical devices to help restore bowel and bladder control in elderly and neurologically impaired persons, disclosed on June 12, 2025, that Jeff Welch will be joining them.
news.headline: Dignify Therapeutics names Jeff Welch as COO, aiming to help elderly and neurologically impaired individuals regain bowel and bladder control.

news.summary: Stardock Entertainment has unveiled the v3.0 Hyperlane Update for Galactic Civilizations IV, a result of collating a year's worth of feedback, suggestions, and enhancements. This massive update, released in Plymouth, Michigan on June 12, 2025, integrates a plethora of improvements based on user input to enrich the gaming experience.
news.headline: Galactic Civilizations IV v3.0 update released by Stardock Entertainment after a year of feedback, with general improvements.

news.summary: Located in Sunnyvale, California, on June 12, 2025, SutiSoft is at the forefront of offering innovative cloud-based solutions that revolutionize business operations in the digital age. The company is thrilled to unveil significant upgrades to their electronic signature platform, SutiSign.
news.headline: SutiSoft introduces enhanced security features to eSignature platform SutiSign with 21 CFR Part 11 compliance.

news.summary: In New York on June 12, 2025, Antimetal revealed a $20 million Series A funding round, with Sound Ventures as the leading investor. This investment aims to address the significant issue of complexity in the modern stack. Antimetal also introduced the beta version of its main platform, which is created to streamline infrastructure processes.
news.headline: Antimetal secures $20M funding led by Sound Ventures to automate infrastructure management, tackling complexity in modern stack.

news.summary: Reports indicate that workplace miscommunication is causing businesses to lose around $1.2 trillion each year, with social division currently reaching unprecedented levels. To address this issue, renowned author, communication specialist, and TEDx speaker Glodean Champion has launched The Process to LOVE™, a communication strategy aimed at promoting collaboration and understanding in professional environments.
news.headline: Glodean Champion's "The Process to LOVE™" aims to tackle $1.2 trillion workplace miscommunication issue.
